resources.string: Tap + to create your first note
Delete this note? Cannot be undone.
You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2024

1. Data Collection
This app does NOT collect, transmit, or share any personal data. All notes are stored entirely on your device using a local Room database.

2. Permissions
This app uses minimal permissions: biometric authentication (optional, for note locking), alarm scheduling (for reminders), and notifications (for reminder alerts). No internet permission is required.

3. Local Storage Only
All notes are stored in a secure local database on your Android device. Only you have access to your notes.

4. Third-Party Services
This app uses no analytics, advertising, or tracking services of any kind.

5. Your Rights
Since no data leaves your device, you have complete control. You can delete all data by clearing the app or uninstalling it.

Contact us through the Play Store listing with any questions.

Terms and Conditions

Last updated: 2024

1. Acceptance
By using this app, you agree to these Terms.

2. License
We grant a personal, non-commercial license to use this app.

3. User Content
You own all notes and data you create. We have no access to it.

4. Disclaimer
This app is provided as-is. We are not liable for data loss. Back up important notes using the built-in Backup feature.

5. Updates
We may update the app and these terms. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

6. Governing Law
Governed by applicable local laws.

Thank you for using Notepad++ – Smart Notes.
